alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min in the dark at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested using 13 ng μl−1 trypsin (sequencing grade; Promega) overnight at 37 °C
collision energy: produced using collision-induced dissociation with 35% normalized collision energy
fragmentation method: fragments were produced using collision-induced dissociation
instrument: analysed on a LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
